name: Bent Mountain Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Bent Mountain Community Center in Bent Mountain, VA! There are 3 wood and asphalt courts. 1 is indoors and 2 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
